  • Powered By

    • Possibility Management Thoughtmaps

      Thoughtware is what you use to think with.

      A 'Thoughtmap' is an energetic diagram of a piece of your Thoughtware.

      Modern culture gives us Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.). If you are still using it, you are helping to exterminate life on Earth at the fastest possible rate.

      Upgraded Thoughtware is available from Possibility Management, providing Thoughtware for regenerative human cultures - Archiarchy.

      Possibility Management is a growing set of tools, distinctions, thoughtmaps, and processes used in the adulthood-initiation radical-responsibility nonmaterial-value centered cultures that are rapidly emerging around world now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. The next culture is called 'Archiarchy'.

      Archiarchy is the culture of archetypally initiated adult women creatively collaborating with archetypally initiated adult men.

      This website collects some of the Thoughtmaps from Archiarchy that we have already discovered. There are many more still to be found.

      A 'Thoughtmap' explains why you think the way you think.

      Your Thoughtmaps are nearly pre-verbal structures out of which you build your worldview. Your Thoughtmaps define how the world works for you. They determine what you can perceive and what you can express.

      Each person assembles a unique set of Thoughtmaps into an Inner Structure for themselves as their best way to survive in the world. This is why different people faced with the same challenges and the same resources create wildly varying results.

      We have found that the closer your Thoughtmaps approximate reality, the more power you have to create useful outcomes.

      We have also discovered that since you needed to already be able to think before you went to school, you adopted a lot of your Thoughtmaps from your parents. Where did they get their Thoughtmaps? From their parents!

      This means you are probably using Thoughtware that has been handed down from generation to generation for thousands of years. You may me using very outdated Thoughtmaps.

      'Thoughtware' is the combination of your Distinctions plus Thoughtmaps.

      You use Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, and Inner Navigating to upgrade your Thoughtware during authentic adulthood initiations or Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).

      Possibility Management Distinctions are available online at the Distinctionary (http://distinctionary.mystrikingly.com).

      Possibility Management Processes are available online at PM Processes (http://pmprocesses.strikingly.com).

      Possibility Management Thoughtmaps are also available at:
      The transformational-learning platform: StartOver.xyz with over 600 interlinked websites (http://startoverxyz.mystrikingly.com)
      The StartOver.xyz Launch Pad: Spaceport (http://spaceport.mystrikingly.com)
      Cards made by Nicola Nagel (https://www.viva-essenza.com/245/shop/possibility-karten-set)
      Possibility Management books in English by Clinton Callahan from Thoughtware Press, and by Patrizia Patz.
      Possibility Management books in German from authors such as Patrizia Patz, Nicola Neumann-Mangoldt, Friederike von Aderkas, and Clinton Callahan.
      And, coming soon: Possibility Management books in Portuguese, Polish, and Spanish!
      Find all PM related books listed at the Museum of Possibility Management (https://museumofpm.mystrikingly.com/#books)
      PM contexted articles at Jewels Of Possibility (http://jewelsofpossibility.mystrikingly.com)
      S.P.A.R.K.s (Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge) (http://sparks-english.mystrikingly.com)
      Rage Clubs (https://rageclub.mystrikingly.com)
      Fear Clubs (https://fearclub.mystrikingly.com)
      Possibility Teams (https://possibilityteam.mystrikingly.com)
      WorkTalks and Workshops listed at the Possibility Management Global Events Teamup Calendar (https://teamup.com/ksv2xq34sxiagcuei1)
      Expand The Box trainings and Possibility Labs found on the Possibility Management global training calendar (http://possibilitymanagement.org/calendar)
      Possibility Management Thoughtmaps, Distinctions, and Processes may prove exceedingly useful for next-culture Professionals such as:
      Possibilitator (http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com)
      Initiator (http://initiations.mystrikingly.com)
      New Refugee Nanonation Builder (http://newrefugees.mystrikingly.com)
      Whole Permaculture (http://archanpermaculture.mystrikingly.com)
      Circular Meeting Technologies Spaceholder (http://torustechnology.mystrikingly.com)
      Gameworld Builder (http://gameworldbuilder.mystrikingly.com)
      Edgeworker (http://edgeworker.mystrikingly.com)
      Riftwalker (http://riftwalkers.mystrikingly.com)
      Ecovillages (http://ecovillage.org)
      Nanonations (http://nanonations.mystrikingly.com)
      Feelings Practitioner (http://feelingspractitioner.org)
      Memetic Engineering (http://memetics.mystrikingly.com)
      Possibility Coaching (http://possibilitycoaching.mystrikingly.com)
      Possibility Mediation (http://possibilitymediation.mystrikingly.com)
      Possibility Psychology (http://possibilitypsychology.mystrikingly.com)
      Possibility Management Trainer (http://trainerpath.mystrikingly.com)
      Rage Club (https://rageclub.org)

      WARNING:

      It would NOT be proper to send you into this Upgraded Thoughtware universe without warning you that if you are ripe for any of the following Thoughtmaps and its Distinctions to land in your Being, you will experience Liquid States in one or more of your 5 Bodies while your Inner Structure reorganizes itself.
      This is a 'good' thing... if evolving your consciousness is your personal hobby.
      Otherwise... it can sometimes be uncomfortable.
      Don't worry, though. Your system knows how to reorganize all by itself. There is nothing you need to do but drink plenty of fresh water, take walks in nature, and rest. In a few minutes, hours, or days you will feel 'right as rain'.
      During Possibilitator Training we have learned from experience that it can be more fun to journey into new Thoughtware territories as a Team, such as in your 3Cell, S.P.A.R.K. Experiment Group, or Possibility Team.
      Please contact us, or anyone at the EHP Dojo (Emotional Healing Process) if you need anything.
      Otherwise, we wish you High Level Fun adventures on your Path!

      StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code PMTHTMAP.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

    • Welcome Maps from Possibility Management Trainings

      The quantity and diversity of Welcome Maps from WorkTalks, Workshops, Trainings, and Possibility Labs is indescribable...

      so we show them to you.

      Think about how much Healing and Transformation has occurred in the spaces that each Welcome Map represents!

    • Quotes From Possibility Management Trainings

      Possibility Management Trainings occur in Extraordinary Transformational Spaces.

      Sometimes the Space has a message for us.

      Here are some messages we have documented.

       

    •  

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

      Your mind is yours to play with 

      and make into whatever you want.

      - Clinton Callahan

      Possibility Management

    StartOver.xyz

    NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code PMTHTMAP.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

    Create your FREE website today!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More
      Accept all
      Settings
      Decline All
      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
      Learn More
